logisticRegression.labelSource: Research-team REBA-2 labels combined with ISO 11228 workbook labels and document-guided ISO 11228-3 pseudo-label fallback

requiredBeforeResearchTrainedAbTest: Expand expert labels to more media sessions before claiming a fully validated research-trained model.
Add xgboost_model.onnx exported from the research-trained XGBoost pipeline before enabling XGBoost A/B testing.
Run offline inference tests against fixed sample joint-feature vectors from the expert-labeled research dataset.
notes: The current Logistic Regression model is a real trained offline artifact using research-team REBA-2 labels for all currently extracted pose rows, combined with ISO 11228 workbook labels and document-guided ISO 11228-3 pseudo labels where applicable.
It is suitable for research-prototype risk communication and repeated data collection, not for clinical diagnosis or a validated injury prediction claim.
